untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Kelly formula optimal leverage calculation and dynamic position sizing based on win rate, win/loss ratio, and historical performance metrics. These require backtested strategy statistics (win_rate, avg_win, avg_loss, sharpe_ratio) that are not available in the allowed indicators list. The parameters lookback_period, threshold, half_life, backtest_sharpe, and backtest_period are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be determined. Position sizing adjustment logic cannot be expressed with only price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a meta-strategy rule requiring access to strategy performance statistics and Kelly criterion calculations rather than direct market indicators. Entry condition approximated as positive returns; exit as negative returns. However, the core intent—dynamically sizing positions based on cumulative P&L through Kelly formula—cannot be fully translated without explicit parameter values and performance metric indicators.
